basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Scout Recruitment 2026 notification released for 1 Scout post. Eligible 10+2 qualified candidates can apply offline by submitting the prescribed application form to Punjab Agricultural University before 12 June 2026. Check eligibility, age limit, salary, application process, and notification details at pau.edu.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Scout Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
